pi_items.verified_value: Real Unsplash image accessible at https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d (800x1200 JPEG)

pi_items.metadata_value: Alternative Unsplash image or synthetic test image if download fails
pi_items.verified_value: Alternative Unsplash photo-1472099645785-5658abf4ff4e (800x533 JPEG) is accessible; fallback creates synthetic image via ImageMagick
pi_items.source: Direct HTTP download verification, setup_sharpen_task.sh code inspection
Official GIMP documentation and multiple web references

pi_items.metadata_value: Sharpness increased by 10-50% (from README line 117) and optimal 15-40% (line 123)
pi_items.verified_value: Verifier checks: sharpness_improved criterion requires >= 10% AND <= 80%; appropriate_range criterion requires >= 5% AND < 60% (verifier.py lines 245-246, 263-264)

pi_items.metadata_value: Over-sharpening detected when contrast increase > 0.8 (80%) (from README line 124)
pi_items.verified_value: Verifier code checks: contrast_increase > 0.8 (line 124 in verifier.py)

pi_items.metadata_value: Over-sharpening detected when noise amplification > 0.5 (50%) (from README line 125)
pi_items.verified_value: Verifier code checks: noise_amplification > 0.5 (line 125 in verifier.py)

pi_items.metadata_value: Need 3 out of 4 criteria met to pass (implied by 75% threshold)
pi_items.verified_value: Verifier uses 4 criteria: sharpness_improved, quality_maintained, meaningfully_changed, appropriate_range; score = (criteria_met / 4) * 100

pi_items.metadata_value: Uses Sobel or Canny edge detection (from README line 93)
pi_items.verified_value: Verifier actually uses Sobel edge detection via cv2.Sobel; Canny is not used

pi_items.metadata_value: Uses Laplacian variance to measure high-frequency content (from README line 100)
pi_items.verified_value: Verifier uses cv2.Laplacian variance (or manual Laplacian kernel as fallback)
Verifier checks: change_percentage > 2% (pixels with > 10 intensity change)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Unsplash portrait images (photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d, 800x1200px) as primary data source with fallback to alternative Unsplash image or synthetic ImageMagick test image. The Unsharp Mask filter task requires detecting sharpening via Sobel edge strength and Laplacian variance metrics. Verification checks 4 criteria: (1) sharpness increased 10-80%, (2) no over-sharpening (contrast increase ≤80%, noise amplification ≤50%), (3) >2% pixel modification (>10 intensity change), (4) appropriate range (5-60% increase). At least 3/4 criteria must pass (75% threshold). CONTRADICTIONS FOUND: (a) README claims GIMP Unsharp Mask defaults are Radius 1.0, Amount 1.0 but actual GIMP defaults are Radius 5.0, Amount 0.5; (b) README recommended ranges (Radius 0.5-2.0, Amount 0.5-1.5) are much narrower than actual GIMP capabilities (Radius 0.1-120, Amount 0.0-5.0); (c) README states 10-50% improvement range but verifier accepts up to 80%.
